text: Hello? Who's this? Hi, good morning, this is Rachel. So, I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Indiana State Relief Program. So, have you been notified about these benefits yet? I don't even have Medicaid. Sorry, but you didn't know that.
